children.text: the name of such person,
the name of the employee (and an identifying number for the employee if wages as defined in section 3121(a) have been paid),
the total amount of wages as defined in section 3401(a),
the total amount deducted and withheld as tax under section 3402,
the total amount of wages as defined in section 3121(a),
the total amount deducted and withheld as tax under section 3101,
Repealed. , , ]Pub. L. 111–226, title II, § 219(a)(3)124 Stat. 2403Aug. 10, 2010

the total amount of elective deferrals (within the meaning of section 402(g)(3)) and compensation deferred under section 457, including the amount of designated Roth contributions (as defined in section 402A),
the total amount incurred for dependent care assistance with respect to such employee under a dependent care assistance program described in section 129(d),
in the case of an employee who is a member of the Armed Forces of the United States, such employee’s earned income as determined for purposes of section 32 (relating to earned income credit),
the amount contributed to any Archer MSA (as defined in section 220(d)) of such employee or such employee’s spouse,
the amount contributed to any health savings account (as defined in section 223(d)) of such employee or such employee’s spouse,
the total amount of deferrals for the year under a nonqualified deferred compensation plan (within the meaning of section 409A(d)),

children.label: A
children.text: coverage to which paragraphs (11) and (12) apply, or

children.label: B
children.text: the amount of any salary reduction contributions to a flexible spending arrangement (within the meaning of section 125),

the total amount of permitted benefit (as defined in section 9831(d)(3)(C)) for the year under a qualified small employer health reimbursement arrangement (as defined in section 9831(d)(2)) with respect to the employee,
the amount includible in gross income under subparagraph (A) of section 83(i)(1) with respect to an event described in subparagraph (B) of such section which occurs in such calendar year,
the aggregate amount of income which is being deferred pursuant to elections under section 83(i), determined as of the close of the calendar year,
the total amount of cash tips reported by the employee under section 6053(a) and the occupation described in section 224(d)(1) such person, and
the total amount of qualified overtime compensation (as defined in section 225(c)).

children.heading: Special rule as to compensation of members of Armed Forces
children.label: b Special rule as to compensation of members of Armed Forces
children.text: In the case of compensation paid for service as a member of the Armed Forces, the statement required by subsection (a) shall be furnished if any tax was withheld during the calendar year under section 3402, or if any of the compensation paid during such year is includible in gross income under chapter 1, or if during the calendar year any amount was required to be withheld as tax under section 3101. In lieu of the amount required to be shown by paragraph (3) of subsection (a), such statement shall show as wages paid during the calendar year the amount of such compensation paid during the calendar year which is not excluded from gross income under chapter 1 (whether or not such compensation constituted wages as defined in section 3401(a)).

children.heading: Additional requirements
children.label: c Additional requirements
children.text: The statements required to be furnished pursuant to this section in respect of any remuneration shall be furnished at such other times, shall contain such other information, and shall be in such form as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe. The statements required under this section shall also show the proportion of the total amount withheld as tax under section 3101 which is for financing the cost of hospital insurance benefits under part A of title XVIII of the Social Security Act.

children.heading: Statements to constitute information returns
children.label: d Statements to constitute information returns
children.text: A duplicate of any statement made pursuant to this section and in accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary shall, when required by such regulations, be filed with the Secretary.

children.heading: Additional requirement
children.label: 1 Additional requirement
children.text: Every person required to deduct and withhold tax under section 3201 from an employee shall include on or with the statement required to be furnished such employee under subsection (a) a notice concerning the provisions of this title with respect to the allowance of a credit or refund of the tax on wages imposed by section 3101(b) and the tax on compensation imposed by section 3201 or 3211 which is treated as a tax on wages imposed by section 3101(b).

children.heading: Information to be supplied to employees
children.label: 2 Information to be supplied to employees
A
children.text: the total amount of compensation with respect to which the tax imposed by section 3201 was deducted,

children.label: B
children.text: the total amount deducted as tax under section 3201, and

children.label: C
children.text: the portion of the total amount deducted as tax under section 3201 which is for financing the cost of hospital insurance under part A of title XVIII of the Social Security Act.

children.heading: Statements required in case of sick pay paid by third parties
children.label: f Statements required in case of sick pay paid by third parties
i
children.text: the name and, if there is withholding under section 3402(), the social security number of such employee,o

children.label: ii
children.text: the total amount of the third-party sick pay paid to such employee during the calendar year, and

children.label: iii
children.text: the total amount (if any) deducted and withheld from such sick pay under section 3402.

children.heading: Statements are in lieu of other reporting requirements
children.label: i Statements are in lieu of other reporting requirements
children.text: The reporting requirements of subparagraph (A) with respect to any payments shall, with respect to such payments, be in lieu of the requirements of subsection (a) and of section 6041.

children.heading: Penalties made applicable
children.label: ii Penalties made applicable
children.text: For purposes of sections 6674 and 7204, the statements required to be furnished by subparagraph (A) shall be treated as statements required under this section to be furnished to employees.

children.heading: Information required to be furnished by employer
children.label: 2 Information required to be furnished by employer
A
children.text: the information shown on the statement furnished under paragraph (1)(A), and

children.label: B
children.text: if any portion of the sick pay is excludable from gross income under section 104(a)(3), the portion which is not so excludable and the portion which is so excludable.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The term “applicable employer-sponsored coverage” means, with respect to any employee, coverage under any group health plan made available to the employee by an employer which is excludable from the employee’s gross income under section 106, or would be so excludable if it were employer-provided coverage (within the meaning of such section 106).

children.label: A
children.text: any coverage (whether through insurance or otherwise) described in section 9832(c)(1) (other than subparagraph (G) thereof) or for long-term care,

children.label: B
children.text: any coverage under a separate policy, certificate, or contract of insurance which provides benefits substantially all of which are for treatment of the mouth (including any organ or structure within the mouth) or for treatment of the eye, or

children.label: C
children.text: any coverage described in section 9832(c)(3) the payment for which is not excludable from gross income and for which a deduction under section 162() is not allowable.l

children.heading: Coverage includes employee paid portion
children.label: 3 Coverage includes employee paid portion
children.text: Coverage shall be treated as applicable employer-sponsored coverage without regard to whether the employer or employee pays for the coverage.

children.heading: Governmental plans included
children.label: 4 Governmental plans included
children.text: Applicable employer-sponsored coverage shall include coverage under any group health plan established and maintained primarily for its civilian employees by the Government of the United States, by the government of any State or political subdivision thereof, or by any agency or instrumentality of any such government.
